title: Object-store and cloud storage boundary
audience: user asking whether S3, GCS, or ADLS runtime I/O works
claim_boundary: Object-store read/write runtime is blocked/report-only; no S3/GCS/ADLS, lakehouse, distributed, credential, network, or production claim.
blocked_explanation: Runtime object-store I/O needs provider, credential, byte-range, retry, idempotency, commit, certificate, and no-fallback evidence before support can be claimed.
expected_output_evidence: A blocked or report-only object-store plan with no provider probe and no external engine invocation.
